The option outcome of C16,178,280 provides a worst-case scenario based on the option being exercised.The option premium is expensive which results in a lower receipt if the option is exercised.Unlike the forward and futures contracts,however,the option allows Boullain Co to retain the upside whilst also protecting against the downside risk.Based on the forward and futures markets,the dollar is expected to strengthen and it is therefore unlikely the option would be exercised. The final hedging choice depends on the board's attitude to risk.However,assuming there is no default risk associated with the forward contract,this may be the best choice under the circumstances.The board may also wish to consider the possibility of not hedging since the dollar is expected to strengthen. 答案解析： 建议 远期和期货合约固定汇率，期货合约产生的收益比远期略高。然而，期货合约面临基差风险， 并每天按市价计价。初始保证金和变动保证金需要融资，并将在短期内影响现金流。 16,178,280的期权结果提供了基于行使期权的最坏情况。期权溢价很高，如果行使期权， 收益会降低。然而，与远期和期货合约不同的是，期权允许 Boullain Co保持上行，同时也 防止下行风险。基于远期和期货市场，美元有望走强，因此不太可能行使期权。 最后对冲的选择取决于董事会对风险的态度。然而，假设没有与远期合同相关的违约风险， 这可能是在这种情况下的最佳选择。董事会还可能希望考虑不对冲的可能性，因为预计美元 将走强。 (c)Calculate and explain the impact of the open futures position on Boullain Co's USS cash flow,based on the settlement prices provided. Requirements解析： 根据提供的结算价格，计算并解释未平仓期货头寸对 Boullain Co US$ 现金流的影响。 Marking Scheme (c) Initial and/or maintenance margins Daily profit or loss calculations Explanation 答案： Marking-to-market Initial margin maintenance margin=$3,500×81=$283,500 1 March: ((1 ·1410-1-1422)/O·0001)x$20x81=$19,440 loss Maintenance margin is 100%of initial margin: Therefore variation margin=$19,440 2 March: (1-1418-1-1410/O·0001)x$20×81=$12,960 profit 3 March: ((1 ·1433-1·1418)/O·0001)x$20x81=$24,300 profit ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM In order to reduce counter-party risk,Boullain Co deposits the initial margin of $283,500 with the clearing house when the futures position is opened.The notional profit or loss at each day's closing settlement price is added to or subtracted from the margin account balance.If the margin account balance falls below the level of the maintenance margin,Boullain Co is required to deposit additional funds to top up the margin account.Boullain Co makes a notional loss at the end of the first day and would therefore pay a variation margin to return the margin account to the level of the specified maintenance margin.Since Boullain Co makes a notional profit on the subsequent two days,the amount in the margin account will be greater than the specified maintenance margin and no variation margin is required.The profit on each of those days may be withdrawn in cash. 答案解析： 为了降低交易对手风险，当期货头寸打开时，Boullain Co存入$283,500的初始保证金。每 天收盘结算价的名义利润或亏损将加入保证金账户或从保证金账户余额中减去。如果保证金 账户余额低于维持保证金水平，则需要Boullain Co存入额外资金。BoullainCo在第一天结 束时发生名义损失，因此将支付变动保证金，以使保证金账户恢复到规定的保证金水平。由 于Boullain Co 在随后两天实现名义利润，因此保证金账户中的金额将大于规定的维持保证 金，不需要变动保证金。每一天的利润可以提取现金。 Hathaway Co operates in the aviation industry,manufacturing safety equipment for commercial aircraft.The company has a policy of carefully appraising new investment opportunities,including the detailed analysis of all cost and revenue assumptions prior to their approval. 题干解析： Hathaway Co从事航空业，为商用飞机制造安全设备。该公司的政策是仔细评估新的投资 机会，包括在批准投资之前对所有成本和收入假设进行详细分析。 Project chi Hathaway Co's board is reviewing a potential investment,project chi.The company's engineers have developed a new technology which can detect the potential for mechanical failure with a greater degree of accuracy than has previously been the case.Early test results have been extremely encouraging. If the board accepts the engineers'proposal,Hathaway Co would need to submit an application to the relevant regulatory authority.It is expected regulatory approval would be granted in one year's time.Manufacturing and sales would commence immediately after being granted regulatory approval.Hathaway Co's chief engineer presented an investment case for project chi to the board, including a summary of the following cost and revenue forecasts and assumptions. Hathaway Co is expected to sell³,000 units in the first year of production with demand increasing by 5%in each subsequent year of its four-year life.These sales forecasts are based on a contribution of $5,000 per unit in the first year of production and increasing at 2%per year in subsequent years.Annual fixed costs of $8.7m are expected in the first year of production, increasing at 3%per year throughout the life of the project. An investment in plant and machinery of$12m will be required as soon as regulatory approval has been granted.Tax allowable depreciation is available on the plant and machinery at an annual rate of 20%on a straight-line basis.A balancing adjustment is expected at the end of the project when the plant and machinery will be scrapped. Tax is payable at 20%in the year in which profits are made.The relevant cost of capital to be used in the appraisal is 12%. 题干解析： Hathaway Co董事会正在审查一项潜在的投资，project chi。该公司的工程师开发了一种 新技术，可以比以前更准确地检测潜在的机械故障。早期测试结果非常令人鼓舞。 如果董事会接受工程师的建议，Hathaway Co需要向相关监管机构提交申请。预计监管部 门将在一年内批准。生产和销售将在获得监管批准后立即开始。Hathaway Co的首席工程 师向董事会提交了project chi的投资方案，以下为成本和收入预测及假设的摘要。 Hathaway Co预计在生产的第一年将售出3000台，在其四年期内的每一年，需求量将增长 5%。这些销售预测是基于生产第一年每台设备$5,000的contribution, 随后几年每年增长 2%。预计生产第一年的年固定成本为$8.7m, 在整个项目生命周期内每年增长3%。 一旦获得监管批准，将需要$12m 的plant and machinery投资。plant and machinery的 Tax allowable depreciation按直线法以每年20%计算。,预计在项目结束时plant and machinery报废并进行balancing adjustment。 盈利年度应按20%缴纳税款。评估中使用的相关资本成本为12%。 Project chi extra information The finance director,however,raised the following objections and consequences to the chief engineer's presentation. The chief engineer's cost and revenue assumptions ignore the possibility of a recession,which has a 20%probability of occurring.In a recession,the total present values for the four years of production are likely to be 40%lower.The finance director also believes there is an alternative, mutually exclusive,development opportunity based on the new technology although this would still depend on it being granted regulatory approval.This alternative option would incur an identical investment cost of $12m but generate annual,inflation adjusted,post-tax cash flows of $3.43m over its seven-year life from year two onwards. The investment case assumes regulatory approval is certain whereas historically only 70%of Hathaway Co's applications have been approved.In one year's time,if the regulatory application is not approved,it is assumed that the concept can be sold to Gepe Co for $1.0m at that time.If the board rejects the proposal now,assume the concept can be sold for $4.3m immediately. 题干解析： 财务总监对总工程师的陈述提出了以下异议。 总工程师的成本和收入假设忽略了经济衰退的可能性，经济衰退发生的可能性为20%。在 经济衰退中，总现值可能会降低40%。财务总监还认为，基于新技术，还有一个相互排斥 的替代发展机会，尽管这机会仍将取决于其是否获得监管部门的批准。这一备选方案将需 要$12m 的相同投资成本，但从第二年开始的七年期内，经通货膨胀调整的年度税后现金流 为$3.43m。 该投资项目假定能获得监管部门的批准，而历史上只有70%的Hathaway Co的申请得到了批 准。一年后，如果未获得批准，则假设该项目届时可以以$1.0m的价格出售给Gepe Co。 如果董事会现在拒绝这个提议，这个项目可以立即以$4.3m 的价格出售。 Projects lambda and kappa A recent board meeting discussed two recent investments,projects lambda and kappa,both involving the construction of new manufacturing plants for safety equipment.Both projects are now operational although project lambda experienced significant time delays and cost overruns while project kappa was under budget and within schedule. On closer examination,the directors noticed that project lambda's revenue far exceeded initial expectations,whereas project kappa's revenue was much less than originally expected.On balance,Hathaway Co's chief executive officer suggested that each project's successes compensated for their respective failings and that this was to be expected when making predictions about the future in an investment plan.However,one of the directors suggested the company could benefit from the introduction of a capital investment monitoring system and post- completion audit.The directors agreed to discuss this in greater depth at the next board meeting. 题干解析： 最近的一次董事会会议讨论了最近的两项投资，即project lambda和project kappa,这两 项投资都涉及新安全设备制造厂的建设。尽管project lambda经历了严重的时间延误和成 本超支，project kappa处于预算内且准时，但这两个项目现在都已投入运营。 经过检查，董事们注意到project lambda的收入远远超出了最初的预期，而kappa项目的 收入远低于最初的预期。总的来说，首席执行官表示，每个项目的成功都弥补了各自的失 败，在对未来投资计划进行预测时这两个项目是有帮助的。然而，其中一位董事表示，公 司可能会受益于引入capital investment monitoring system和post-completion audit。董 事们同意在下次董事会会议上对此进行更深入的讨论。 Required: (a)(i)Evaluate the financial acceptability of the project chi investment proposal based on the chief engineer's forecasts,assuming regulatory approval is granted in one year's time.(6 marks) (ii)Calculate the expected net present value of the proposal based on the finance director's assumptions about the likelihood of a recession and the potential impact on project chi's cash flows.(2 marks) (iii)Calculate the net present value of the finance director's alternative option for the technology and advise the board whether this is worth pursuing.(3 marks) (iv)Recommend whether the board should proceed with the application for regulatory approval after taking into consideration Hathaway Co's 70%approval rate with its regulatory applications or to sell the concept now to Gepe Co.Include in your analysis any comments on your findings.(6marks) Requirements解析： (i) 根据总工程师的预测，评估project chi投资方案的财务可接受性，假设一年后获得监 管批准。 (ii) 根据财务总监关于衰退可能性和对project chi现金流的潜在影响的假设，计算提案的 预期净现值。 (iii) 计算财务总监对该技术的备选方案的净现值，并告知董事会这是否值得投资。 (iv) 建议董事会在考虑到Hathaway Co 70%的监管申请批准率后，是否继续进行监管批准 申请，或者现在将该概念出售给Gepe 公司。在分析中需要包含对结果的评价。 Marking Scheme (a)(i) Contribution Fixed costs Tax(including tax allowable depreciation) NPV 2 1 2 1 (ii) Expected NPV (iii) Alternative option NPV Decision outcome (iv) Decision Comments 答 案 ： (i) Net present value(NPV):All figures are in Sms unless otherwise indicated Year Contribution (wl) Fixed costs Tax allowable depreciation Balancing adjustment Taxable profits Taxation (20%) Add back depreciation Investment cost (12-00) Cash flows (12-00) Discount factors(12%) 0-893 Discounted cash flows (10-72) NPV 7-02 15·00 (2 40)(8 ··70) (2 40) 3·90 (0·78) 2·40 5·52 0-797 4·40 16-07 (2 40)(8 ··96) (2 40) 4·71 (0·94) 2·40 6·17 0-712 4·39 17·21 (2 40)(9-23) (2 40) 5·58 (1-12) 2·40 6·86 0-636 4·36 18·43 (2 40)(9 ··51) (2 40) (2·40) 4-12 (0·82) 4·80 8·1 0-567 4·59 Workings Working 1(w1):Contribution Year 2 3 4 5 Volume(000s) 3-00 3-15 3-31 3-47 Contribution per unit($000s) 5·00 5·10 5·20 5·31 Contribution ($m) 15·00 16-07 17·21 18·43 (ii)Incorporating finance director's objections Expected NPV of chief engineer's proposal: PV of years 2-5=$17-74m 60%PV of years 2-5=$10·64m Expected PV of years 2-5=(0·8x$17-74m+0-2x$1064m)=$16·32m Expected NPV=$16·32m-$10-72m=$5·6m ii i)Alternative option NPV Annuity factor(12%,t2-t8)=4-968-0-893=4-075 PV of years 2-8=4075x$3·43m=$13·98m NPV=$13·98m-$10-72m=$3-26m Therefore,it is more beneicial to follow the chief engineer's proposal. (iv)Apply for regulatory approval or sell Next,consider decision to sell to Gepe Co now or continue with application for regulatory approval. DELIVERY-PLAT NPV of sale to Gepe Co now =$4·3m Expected NPV=07x$5·6m+0·3x(0-893x$1 ·0m)=$4·19m Therefore,more beneficial to sell immediately to Gepe Co. Recommendation: Immediate sale to Gepe Co for $4·3 million. Comments Based on the chief engineer's assumptions,the project generates a positive NPV of $7.02 million and should therefore be accepted in preference to the option to sell the concept for $4.3 million.On the other hand,when the finance director's objections are incorporated into the appraisal,the expected NPV is only $4.19million and should therefore be rejected in favour of the option to sell. It should be noted that the expected NPV of $4.19million is an average.In other words,it is the average NPV if the project is carried out repeatedly which may not be useful in the case of a one- off development opportunity.Based on the calculations above,there is a 30%chance that the NPV will be only $893,000,which may pose a risk the directors are not prepared to take.The directors' attitude to risk will be an important factor in the final decision. Furthermore,the analysis largely depends upon the values of the probabilities prescribed,the range of possible outcome and the accuracy of the revenue and cost assumptions.Sensitivity analysis may be useful in testing the impact of variations in each of these variables on the final outcome. 答 案 解 析 ： 评论 根据总工程师的假设，该项目产生了$7.02 million 的正净现值，因此优于以$4.3 million出 售该概念的方案。另一方面，当财务总监的反对意见纳入评估时，预计净现值仅为$4.19 million, 因此应接受出售概念。 应当指出，$4.19 million 的预期净现值是平均值。换言之，如果项目重复进行，这是平均净 现值，在一次性开发机会的情况下可能没有用处。根据以上计算，净现值只有$893,000的 可能性为30%,这可能是董事不愿意承担的风险。董事对风险的态度将是最终决定的一个重 要因素。 此外，分析在很大程度上取决于概率值、可能结果的范围以及收入和成本假设的准确性。敏 感性分析可能有助于测试这些变量的变化对最终结果的影响。 (b)Explain the rationale for implementing capital investment monitoring systems and post- completion audits.Suggest ways in which Hathaway Co may have benefited if these procedures had been applied to projects lambda and kappa.(8marks) Requirements解析： 解释implementing capital investment monitoring systems and post-completion audits 的基本原理。如果将这些程序应用于project lambda和project kappa项目，会给公司带 来什么好处。 Marking Scheme (b) Capital investment monitoring: Rationale Benefits Post-completion audit: Rationale Benefits 2 2-3 Max 8 Total 25 答案： Whilst Hathaway Co's investment plans are based on a detailed analysis of all cost and revenue assumptions,projects lambda and kappa highlight failings in the appraisal and implementation phases. Capital investment monitoring Capital investment monitoring involves reviewing the implementation of an investment project to ensure it progresses according to the original investment plan,timescale and budget.This involves assessing the risks associated with the implementation phase and identifying deviations from the investment plan so that remedial action can be taken where necessary.Controls should be established to ensure effective delivery of the project. Effective investment monitoring may have avoided the cost overruns and time delays experienced by Hathaway Co's project lambda.The appointment of a project manager would have ensured ownership of the project and provided accountability for time delays and cost increases.The original investment plan,including cost estimates,provides a benchmark against which actual performance can be assessed.An effective monitoring system would ensure that any changes to the cost estimates would be justified and authorised.Where significant deviations are encountered, it may be necessary to terminate the project.A project steering committee would ensure greater scrutiny and accountability and oversee the implementation phase. Post-completion audit A post-completion audit is an objective,after the fact,appraisal of all phases of the capital investment process regarding a specific project.Each project is examined from conception until as much as a few years after it has become operational.It examines the rationale behind the initial investment decision,including the strategic fit,and the efficiency and effectiveness of the outcome.The key objective is to improve the appraisal and implementation of future capital investment projects by learning from past mistakes and successes. An effective post-completion audit may have identified the reasons behind the failure of Hathaway Co's project kappa to achieve its forecast revenues.By comparing the actual project outcome with the original projections,an audit will examine whether the benefits claimed prior to approval ever materialise.The audit is not an academic exercise;an effective audit would identify failings and help Hathaway Co learn from past mistakes as well replicate its successes.Project kappa's principal failing seems to be the inaccuracy of the revenue assumptions.An audit would establish the reasons behind that failing and identify ways in which this can be addressed.For example,it is possible the initial assumptions failed to predict future competitor actions or the full range of potential economic scenarios.In this way,Hathaway Co's managers benefit by learning how to appraise investment proposals more accurately and implement them more efficiently than before. 答案解析： 虽然Hathaway Co的投资计划基于对所有成本和收入假设进行详细分析，但是project lambda 和project kappa体现了评估和实施阶段的失败。 Capital investment monitoring Capital investment monitoring是审查投资项目的实施情况，以确保其按照原始投资计 划、时间和预算进行。这包括评估与实施阶段相关的风险，并确定与投资计划的偏差，以 便在必要时采取补救措施。应建立控制措施，以确保项目的有效交付。 有效的Capital investment monitoring可能避免Hathaway Co project lambda所经历的成 本超支和时间延误。任命一名项目经理将确保项目的执行，并对时间延误和成本增加负 责。最初的投资计划(包括成本估算)提供了一个基准，可据此评估实际业绩。有效的 Capital investment monitoring将确保对成本估算的任何更改都是合理的和授权的。如果 遇到重大偏差，可能需要终止项目。项目指导委员会将确保加强监督和问责，并监督实施 阶段。 Post-completion audit Post-completion audit是对特定项目资本投资过程所有阶段的客观事后评估。每一个项目 从构思到投入运营几年后都会进行审查。它考察了初始投资决策背后的基本原理，包括战 略契合度以及结果的效率和有效性。关键目标是通过从过去的错误和成功中吸取教训，改 进未来资本投资项目的评估和实施。 有效的Post-completion audit可以帮助Hathaway Co 发 现project kappa未能实现预期收 入的原因。通过将实际项目结果与最初的预测进行比较，审计将检查在批准之前所声称的 利润是否实现。审计不是学术活动；有效的审计将发现失败，帮助Hathaway Co从过去的 错误中吸取教训，并复制成功。project kappa的主要失败似乎是收入假设的不准确。审计 将确定失败的原因，并确定解决方法。例如，最初的假设可能无法预测未来竞争对手的行 动或所有潜在的经济情景。通过这种方式， Hathaway Co的管理人员可以通过学习如何更 准确地评估投资建议并比以前更有效地实施这些建议从而受益。 OMUJNE DELMEY·PATALM高顿教育 OMUJNE DELMEY·PATALM GOLDEN EDUCATION

stem_zh: Q1:King 公司 题干文字部分解析 公司概要介绍： 1 Kingtim Co Kingtim Co is a nationwide chain of garden centres,selling products such as plants,fertilisers,tools and garden furniture.It was established 20 years ago by the current team of executive directors,and achieved a listing on its local stock market four years ago.Since listing,the company has made consistent profits and has been able to increase its dividends each year.The executive directors collectively own between them 25%of issued share capital.The remaining shares are held by a number of investors,with none of them owning more than 10%of issued share capital. Two of Kingtim Co's major competitors have been taken over in the last two years.Media coverage suggests that further takeovers are possible.Potential acquirers include other chains of garden centres,property developers and supermarket chains looking to diversify their business into the profitable garden centre sector.As yet,no potential acquirer has approached Kingtim Co to buy the whole chain,although Kingtim Co has had enquiries from other businesses wanting to purchase individual garden centres.Kingtim Co can sell a number of individual garden centres without threatening its continued existence. King公司是一家全国性的园艺品店，销售植物、化肥、工具和花园家具等产品。该公司 于20年前由目前的执行董事团队成立，四年前在当地股票市场上市。自上市以来，公 司利润稳定，每年都能增加股息。执行董事们共同拥有25%的已发行股本。其余的股份 由许多投资者持有，没有一个人持有超过10%的已发行股本。 King 公司的两个主要竞争对手在过去两年中被收购。媒体的报道表明，进一步的收购行 为是可能的。潜在的收购者包括其他园艺品店、房地产开发商和连锁超市，它们希望将 业务多元化，能在高利润率的园艺品业务中分一杯羹。 到目前为止，还没有潜在的收购者联系过 King 公司来收购整个连锁店，尽管 King 公司 已经询问了其他想要购买个人花园中心的企业。King公司可以在不威胁其继续存在的情 况下出售一些独立的花园中心。 Takeover defences Kingtim Co's executive directors remain committed to the business.They are fearful of a takeover,believing that the new owners will want some,or all of them,to leave the company.They have therefore been considering possible defences against a takeover bid.Kingtim Co's chief executive has received two proposals from directors: - Sell individual garden centres which would be particularly attractive to purchasers.Disposal of these centres wouldCA make Kingtim Co,overall,a less attractive purchase. - Pay the executive directors higher remuneration and change their contracts so that they would receive much higher compensation for loss of office if their contracts were terminated early. Kingtim Co's chief executive believes,however,that any defence Kingtim Co adopts should also strengthen the company's future.She is therefore proposing to expand the company's current limited sales of camping products in its garden centres by establishing a chain of Kingtim outdoor shops,selling camping,walking and other outdoor equipment.The outdoor retail sector is competitive,but the chief executive believes that Kingtim Co will be successful. The establishment of the chain of outdoor shops would be funded solely by debt,the idea being that changing Kingtim Co's finance structure by having significantly more debt would make it less attractive to acquirers. 针对潜在收购的防御策略 King 公司的执行董事仍致力于业务。他们担心被收购，认为新的竞争者希望全部或者部 分收购king公司。因此，董事们一直在考虑防范要约收购的可能性。 king 公司的首席执行官收到了董事们的两份提议： -出售对买家特别有吸引力的个人花园中心 (king 公司的核心资产)。总的来说，处置这 些中心将使king公司的吸引力降低。 -向执行董事支付更高的薪酬，并更改合同，如果雇佣合同提前终止，被辞退的董事将 获得更高的离职补偿。 然而，king 公司的首席执行官认为，king 公司采取的任何防御措施都应该致力于公司 未来的发展。因此，CEO 提议：扩大公司目前在花园中心有限的露营产品销售，建立一 个 king 户外商品连锁商店(进军户外零售新版块),主要销售野营、步行和其他户外设 备。尽管户外零售行业目前的竞争是比较激烈的，但首席执行官相信 King 公司将会在 竞争中取得成功。户外商品连锁店的建立将完全依赖债务融资，其想法是，通过显著增 加债务规模来改变 King 公司的财务结构，降低其对潜在收购者的吸引力。 Financial details Kingtim Co currently has 25 million$1 shares in issue,with a current share price of $5·56 per share.It also has 0·45 million 6·5%bonds in issue.Each 6·5%bond has a nominal value of $100,and is currently trading at $104 per $100.The premium on redemption of the bonds in three years'time is 2%.Based on a yield to maturity approach,the after-tax cost of the bonds is 4·1%. Kingtim Co's quoted equity beta for its existing garden centre business is 0·9. Kingtim Co plans to issue 0·6 million,7·5%,new bonds,each with a nominal value of $100.These bonds will be redeemable in four years'time at a premium of 8%.The coupon on these bonds will be payable on an annual basis. These bonds are anticipated to have a credit rating of BBB-.The issue of the new 7·5%bonds will not affect the market value of Kingtim Co's shares or the existing6·5%bonds. The market value of the new bonds will be determined by using information relating to Kingtim Co's credit rating and the four bonds which the government has issued to estimate Kingtim Co's yield curve.All the bonds are of the same risk class.Details of the bonds are as follows: 财务信息： 股票：已公开发行2500万股面值为$1的股票，目前每股市场价格为$5.56 债券：已发行面值为$100每张，票面利率6.5%,数量合计45万只的债券；当前该债券 交易价格为$104每张债券，到期日会以高于面值2%的溢价赎回；基于收益率曲线法，估 计这些债券的税后资本成本是4.1% King公司目前在花园中心业务的贝塔权益是0.9 King 计划发行60万只、票面利率7.5%的新债券，每只债券的面值为100美元。这些债 券将在四年后以高于面值8%的溢价赎回。这些债券的利息将按年支付。预计这些债券 的信用评级为BBB-。发行7.5%的新债券不会影响 king 公司的股票市价及现有的6.5%的 债券的市场价值 新债券的市场价值的估计将通过使用有关 king 公司信用评级的信息和政府已发行的四 种债券来确定。所有的债券都属于同一风险类别。这些债券的详情如下： Bond Ga Th De Ro Credit Rating BBB- Annual yield (based on spot rate) 4% 4 ·3% 4 ·7% 5 ·2% spreads,shown in basis points,are as follows: 1 year 2 years 56 78 Redeemable in 1 year 2 years 3 years 4 years 3 years 106 4 years 135 债券名称 年化收益率 年限 GA 4% 1年 TH 4.3% 2年 DE 4.7% 3年 RO 5.2% 4年 LDEN信用利差(以基点表示) LDEN DUCATT0 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 信用评级 1年 2年 3年 4年 BBB- 56 78 106 135 Kingtim Co plans to invest $60m in non-current assets for the outdoor shops(working capital requirements can be ignored).Currently,Kingtim Co's non-current assets have a net book value of $150m.It is assumed that the proportion of the book value of non-current assets which willbe invested in the outdoor shops and the garden centres will give a fair representation of the size of each business within Kingtim Co.The asset beta of similar companies in the outdoor retailsector is assumed to be 0·88. Before taking into consideration the impact of this new investment,Kingtim Co's forecast pre-tax earnings for the coming year is $24m.It is estimated that the new investment will make a 10%pre-tax return. The corporation tax rate applicable to all companies is 25%per year.The current risk-free rate of return is estimated to be 4%and the market risk premium is estimated to be 9%. king 公司计划在户外商品连锁商店的非流动资产上投资6000万美元(营运资金投入可 以忽略)。目前，king 公司的非流动资产的账面净值为1.5亿美元。假定投资于户外商品 连锁商店业务和花园中心业务的非流动资产的账面价值的比例，将公平地代表 king 公 司内各业务的规模。在户外零售领域的类似公司的贝塔资产为0 ·88。 在考虑到这项新投资的影响之前，king 公司预计未来一年的税前收益为2400万美元。 据估计，新的投资将获得10%的税前利润，公司税率为每年25%。目前的无风险利率估 计为4%,市场风险溢价为9%。 Employee remuneration Kingtim Co's annual report contains a general commitment to act with social responsibility,in line with society's expectations.It also commits to paying its staff fairly in accordance with their responsibilities and states that its staff are vital to its success. To try to improve the situation of low-paid employees,the government has recommended a basic hourly wage as the minimum level employees should be paid,although this minimum is not legally enforceable.A newspaper investigation has revealed that some staff in Kingtim Co's garden centres in the northern region of the country are paid up to 15% less per hour than the recommended minimum wage.Most of these staff are part-time staff,working limited hours each week. The manager of Kingtim Co's northern region centres,when asked to comment,stated that Kingtim Co had obligations to its shareholders to control staff costs.Lower pay levels were necessary to differentiate between staff,ensuring that managers and staff with experience and expertise were appropriately rewarded.The manager commented that pay levels also reflected the lower commitment to Kingtim Co which part-time staff made compared with full-time staff. 职工薪酬相关事项 king 公司的年度报告包含了履行社会责任的一般承诺，符合社会的期望。它还承诺按照 工作人员的职责公平地向其支付报酬，并声明其工作人员对其成功至关重要。 为了改善低薪雇员的情况，政府建议设立一个最低时薪保障，尽管这个最低工资保障在 法律上无法强制执行。 一份报纸调查显示，英国北部地区 king 公司花园中心的一些员 工每小时的工资比建议的最低工资低15%。这些员工大多是兼职员工，每周工作时间有 限。 king 公司北部地区中心的经理在被要求回复该事项时表示， king 公司对其股东有责任 控制员工成本。较低的工资水平必须被用于区分工作人员，以确保具有经验和专门知识 的管理人员和工作人员得到适当的奖励。经理评论说，兼职员工相比全职员工对公司做 出的贡献少，所以薪酬也更低。 题目
explanation_zh: (a) Discuss the feasibility and effectiveness of the defence strategies of selling off individual garden centres and enhancing directors'remuneration. 讨论董 事们防御收购策略的两项提议是否可行 答案解析： ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM Sell-off of garden centres 出售花园中心业务 Selling some of the most desirable garden centres,known as selling the crown jewels, may deter some acquirers looking to buy the whole chain if Kingtim Co sells the assets they most desire.Kingtim Co could take this option if it is able to sell off individual centres without jeopardising its overall existence. 专业名词：皇冠上的珠宝专门指公司最核心最盈利的业务通过这种方式可以剥离企业 的核心业务降低收购者的兴趣 However if no particular use is made of the cash raised from the sales,Kingtim Co would stillremain a tempting takeover target due to its cash surpluses.Returning the surplus cash to shareholders in the form of a one-off dividend might be popular with shareholders,but equally they might be concerned about their future returns given the sale of assets generating significantincome.Shareholders and others interested in Kingtim Co might also question what future strategies the board had in mind if it did not use these cash surpluses for investment. Also,if the money was distributed to shareholders,Kingtim Co would become a smaller company and perhaps more affordable to some potential acquirers.。但是 一 旦剥离了 核心资产企业未来的发展就何难维持另外处置资产后获得的现金如果不能及时有效 利用也会成为收购方的另一个目标；回购股票或者支付一次性的现金股利的措施也要 进一步考虑；公司体量变小更容易被其他大公司侵吞 Enhanced directors'remuneration and contracts 更改劳动合约增加董事薪酬 (Golden parachutes 专业名词也可以解释为金色降落伞) The enhanced commitments to the directors would represent an increased burden for acquirers,either the costs of honouring them,or the cost and the time involved in terminating the directors'employment and compensating them.This burden may deter acquirers,particularly if the decision to acquire is marginal.通过提高未来辞退董事的补 偿金额来吓退潜在的收购者 However,enhancing the commitments to the directors could be ineffective.The acquirer could decide to keep the directors on and pay the increased remuneration.Alternatively, the acquirer may feel that buying out the directors'contracts and compensating them is a necessary cost that it is prepared to bear.收购者如果早已做好了心理和成本准备效 果就不大了 Corporate governance aspects are also important.As a listed company,Kingtim Co should have a remuneration committee made up of non-executive directors,who should be reviewing the executive directors'remuneration packages.Kingtim Co may have to publish a remuneration report to explain the rationale for directors'remuneration,and to allow shareholders to discuss and perhaps vote on the report. 完善的治理结构会有专门 的薪酬委员会来制定董事的薪酬政策 Shareholders may believe that the directors are being given a better compensation package without having earned it,and for no other reason than to try to protect their own positions.They may doubt whether directors are acting in the best interests of the company and its shareholders 董事的利益应当始终与广大股东保持一致 (b)Prepare a report for the board of directors of Kingtim Co which: 给董事会准备一份报告内容应当包含 (i) estimates the company's cost of capital before the new bonds are issued; 评估发行新债券前公司的资本成本 思路： 使用wacc公式计算公司的加权平均资本成本、 核心是找到四个参数的值 Ve Vd Ke Kdat Ke:用 CAPM 公式直接找到对应的参数 =4 ·0%+(0 ·9×9 ·0%)=12-1% Ve:用股数乘以每股市价 =$5-56×25 million shares =$139m Kdat: 已知税后的债务资本成本4.1% Vd: 用票面价值乘以交易溢价/折价倍数得到市场价值 =45*(104/100)=46.8m 带入公式：WACC=(12-1%×139)+(4-1%×46 ·8)/(139+46-8)=10-1% (ii ) estimates the market value and yield to maturity of the new bonds; 评估新发行债券的市场价值和新债券的整体到期收益率 思路： 由于已知 king 公司的信用评级，政府债券的无风险利率及信用利差 我们可以通过使用收益率曲线法准确获得不同年限下对应的 king 公司的债券 收益率。(政府债券收益率+信用利差) 年限 政府债券收益率a 信用利差b King公司每年 债券收益率(a+b) 1 4% 0.56% 4.56% 2 4.3% 0.78% 5.08% 3 4.7% 1.06% 5.76% 4 5.2% 1.35% 6.55% 同时结合债务估值模型： 债务的市场价值等于未来本金和利息的折现之和， 而折现率的确定刚好就是上一步骤中计算的得到的不同年限下对应的 king 公 司的债券收益率。另外，新债券的期限以及票面利率，到期赎回价值题干中也 已经明确给出。我们就可以获得每年对应的现金流，之后折现加总就得到了债 券的价值 每张100美元的债券估值： 每年支付的票面利息：=100*7.5%=7.5 第四年末支付的赎回本金=100*1.08(按8%的溢价赎回)=108 所以1-3末的现金流：7.5 第四年末的现金流：7.5+108=115.5 Value of new bonds based on annual yield curve $7·50×10456^-1+$7-50×10508^-2 +$7·50×10576^-3+$115-50× 1·0655^-4=$109·92 即每张票面价值100美元的债券出售定价为$109.92 因此新发行的债券总的市场价值=60*109.92/100=$65.952 计算新债券整体的到期收益率 到期收益率即公司新发行债券税后的真实债务资本成本(因为利息是可以抵 税的)计算方式就是以到期收益率作为折现率后未来偿付利息和本金的现值 刚好等于目前发售债券的市场价值。因此接下来我们来模拟新发行债券站在公 司角度的现金流情况； 第0年：发行债券收到109.92的认购款 1-4年：支付税后利息7.5×(1-25%)=5.63(5.625) 第4年：支付债券赎回款100*1.08=108 那么使得上述现金流的净现值为0的折现率是多少呢? 可以使用内插法或者excel 公式的IRR()进行求解答案为4.7% 这里不同方式下的计算可能会存在误差但不影响答案 ERY-PLATINUM (iii) estimates the revised cost of equity and revised cost of capital if the new bonds are issued; 计算新发行债权后公司新的股权资本成本和加权资本成本 思 路 ： 我们先看看户外零售新业务开展后公司的整体变化 发行债券前： 发行债券后： 60, 29%150, 29% 71% ■户外业务 ■花园中心业务 由于引进了新的业务我们需要计算公司在两种业务模式下新的贝塔权益是多 少 这就需要用到新的贝塔资产和资本结构 由于新的贝塔资产是由两块业务按非流动资产的比例加权合并得到，我们要先 获得原花园中心业务的贝塔资产，这可以通过卸载发行债权前贝塔权益的杠杆 得到(因为这时候的贝塔权益只有单一的花园中心业务) βa garden centre business =0·9×(139/(139+(46.8×0·75)))=0.72 已知户外业务的贝塔资产是0.88,两块业务的非流动资产的比例是150:60 因此我们要得到双业务模式下公司的新的贝塔资产： Weighted average βa=(0-72×(150/(150+60)))+(0·88×(60/(150+60))= 0·77 加载新的财务杠杆就可以得到新的贝塔权益： βe=0-77×(139+((46-8+65952)×0·75)/139)=1-24 使用capm 和 wacc 的相关公式即可求得： ke =40%+(1-24×9·0%)=15·2% WACC=((15·29%×139)+(4-1%×46·8)+(4-7%×65-952)/(139+46-8+65-952) =10-4%(由于债的资本成本有多种，因此这里要分开计算) (iv)estimates the impact of the chief executive's proposal on forecast after-tax earnings for the coming year; 估计首席执行官的建议对未来税后收益预测的影响 思路： 主要是依据题干中给的预测信息进行计算 先预测正常的税后利润： Forecast after-tax earnings ($24m×0·75)18,000 由于新发行债券会新增多少税后利息费用 Additional finance cost ($60m×7·5%×075)(3,375) 由于向户外业务投资60m 可以带来多少额外的税后收益 Additional after-tax earnings due to new investment ($60m×10%×075)4,500 影响合计：18000-3375+4500=19,125 净增：19125-18000=1,125 (v)Discusses the impact on Kingtim Co's cost of capital and the reaction of equity and bond holders to the chief executive's proposal.The discussion should include an explanation of any assumptions made in the estimates in (b)(i)-(iv)above. 讨论上述行为对king 公司资本成本的影响及股东和债权人对CEO 的提议的潜在看法； 讨论中应当包含(i)-(iv)中计算的假设 Cost of capital There are two impacts,in opposite directions,on the weighted average cost of capital. Kingtim Co's cost of equity has risensignificantly.This is due to increased business risk, resulting from the investment in the outdoor shops and increased financial risk from the additional debt.The increase in the cost of equity has pushed the weighted average cost of capital upwards. However,the higher proportion of debt in the company's finance structure,with debt having a lower cost than equity and also being tax-deductible,has pushed the weighted average cost of capital downwards. Overall,however,the weighted average cost of capital has risen,meaning the increase in the cost of equity has had the greater impact. 资本成本的影响 对资本的加权平均成本有两种相反方向的影响。 King 公司的股权成本大幅上升。这是由 于对户外商店的投资以及额外债务增加的财务风险增加而导致的商业风险增加。股权成 本的增加推动了资本的加权平均成本上升。 然而，债务在公司财务结构中所占比例较高，债务成本低于股权，而且可以减税，这推 动了资本的加权平均成本下降。 总体而言，加权平均资本成本上升，这意味着股本成本的增加产生了更大的影响。 Assumptions 假设 The assumptions about the returns from the new investment may depend on how much Kingtim Co can attract customers awayfrom competitors rather than finding a new market niche itself.Competitor reaction may also impact upon returns. 公司未来的盈利取决于 新进入的户外零售领域其他竞争者的反映 The CAPM model used is assumed to be a good predictor of equity returns,although some published evidence suggests that it may not be.用 capm 公式计算Ke 存在固有局 限性 The asset beta used for the outdoor shops is a representative beta for similar companies and may not be accurate for Kingtim Co.The asset beta used to calculate the revised cost of equity is a weighted average of the asset betas of the two businesses.The weighting used is the non-current assets in each business,which is assumed to approximate to the size of each business. This assumes that non-current assets currently held are valued fairly,and that their valuation represents their income-generating otential and the proportion of business risk that each business represents. 双业务模式下的贝塔资产是按照不同业务的非流动资产 比例进行加权平均可能不太精准 The share price and price of the existing bonds are assumed to remain unchanged when the new investment is made.As discussed below,there is a strong possibility of changes in the shareholder base leading to changes in the share price and hence in the cost of capital.发行新的债权引入新业务后公司股价和原债券市场价值不会受到影响 Equity holders 股东 Equity holders may consider the returns from the new investment to be insufficient.The pre-tax return of 10%is lower than the 16%pre-tax return on the existing garden centres, and is not much above the 7·5%pre-tax finance cost of the bonds used to finance the investment. 原有单一花园中心业务下税前利润24m 投资150m 投资回报率为24/150=16% 而新的户外业务投入60m 而投资回报率只有10%相比花园中心业务的回报率要低很多 也仅比新发行的债权7.5%的利率高一点风险较大 Equity holders are likely to be concerned about the increases in both business and financial risks.The increase in business risk is due to the higher business risk for the outdoor shops,due to the competition in that sector.Equity holders will be concerned about the possible variability of returns and also of dividends,as the company is committed to an increased operating cost burden in terms of extra premises and increased finance costs.Variability of returns may also result in the share price becoming more volatile. 股东可能会担心商业和金融风险的增加。商业风险的增加是由于户外商店的业务风险增 加，由于该行业的竞争。股东将担心回报和股息的可能变化，因为公司致力于在额外场 所和增加财务成本方面增加运营成本负担。回报的可变性也可能导致股价变得更加波动。 Other aspects concerning equity holders might be any restrictive covenants attached to the new bonds that affect payment of dividends and also the planned repayment of the bonds.Kingtim Co already has a significant commitment to repay the $45m bonds in three years'time.The new bonds would mean an additional commitment to repay $60m just a year later.The alternative is refinancing,but the terms that would be available are currently unknown. 发行新的债券可能会附带有限制性契约条款，这些契约会影响股息的支付以及债券的计 划偿还。King 公司已经做出了重大承诺，将在三年内偿还4500万美元的债券。新债券 将意味着一年后额外承诺偿还6000万美元。另一种选择是再融资，但可用的条款目前 尚不清楚 These risks may mean that equity holders reconsider their investment in Kingtim Co,if they are risk-averse and do not feel that the additional returns compensate for the risk. They will take into account that the return on investment in the new business is lower than the current return on investment in the garden centres,although they are not required to make any additional investment themselves for the return on the outdoor shops.The share price will fall if a significant number of shareholders decide to selltheir shares,although Kingtim Co may attract a new clientele of shareholders who are more risk-seeking. 这些风险可能意味着，如果股东厌恶风险，并且不认为额外回报弥补了风险，他们就会 重新考虑他们在 King 公司的投资。他们将考虑到新业务的投资回报率低于目前在花园 中心的投资回报，尽管他们不需要自己进行任何额外的投资来获得户外商店的回报。如 果大量股东决定出售股票，股价将会下跌，但是 King 公司可能会吸引更多寻求风险的 股东的新客户。 Bond holders债券持有人 Bond holders are likely to be most concerned about Kingtim Co's ability to meet its interest and repayment commitments.Holders of the new bonds are particularly likely to be concerned about the ability to repay their capital,given the commitment to repay existing bond holders.Bond holders may also be concerned about whether the financing of the investment allows Kingtim Co to take undue risks.They may wonder about the motivation for undertaking the new investment using debt finance,particularly if they are not convinced about its business case. 债券持有人可能最关心king公司及时还本付息的能力。鉴于承诺偿还现有债券持有人， 新债券持有人特别可能担心偿还本金的能力。债券持有人也可能担心投资融资是否允许 King 公司承担不必要的风险。他们可能想知道使用债务融资进行新投资的动机，特别是 如果他们不相信 king 公司在户外业务经营中是否能获得成功。 Conclusion 结 论 Assuming a strong business case can be made for the investment and the estimates are robust,Kingtim Co may be able to justify financing it solely by debt and claim that the increase in financial risk is within acceptable levels.However,before committing to further debt,Kingtim Co must provide a clear plan for repayment of both the current and new bonds,or offer sufficient assurance that it will be able to refinance its debt when it is due for repayment. 后续计划的成功还要取决于公司对户外业务的运营能力及是否可以按时偿还负债。 (c)Discuss the approach taken to employee remuneration by Kingtim Co's Northern region and the issues associated with it 讨论 King 公司对北部区域公司员工薪酬的做法和潜在相关的问题 Approach taken 采取的方法 The stated approach to employee remuneration has some business logic.Expertise, experience,seniority and commitment are all attributes that staff have that could be reflected in extra rewards for them,not only out of fairness to the staff but also because of their value to the business.If staff with these attributes believe they are not being rewarded fairly,they may leave and perhaps join a competitor. 上述的员工薪酬方法有一些商业逻辑。专业知识、经验、资历和承诺都是工作人员所拥 有的属性，可以反映在对他们的额外奖励中，这不仅是对员工的公平，而且因为他们对 企业的价值。如果具有这些特质的员工认为他们没有得到公平的奖励，他们可能会离开， 也许会加入竞争对手 Kingtim Co also has a duty to enhance the wealth of its shareholders and has raised expectations by recently increasing dividends.There is a stakeholder conflict,as increasing the wages of many employees would lead to lower profits and less money available for distribution to shareholders. King 公司也有责任增加其股东的财富，并通过最近增加股息来提高预期。存在利益相关 者冲突，因为增加许多员工的工资会导致利润降低，可用于分配给股东的资金减少。 Issues with approach 该做法可能出现的问题 The statement about part-time staff not having the same level of commitment may well be unjust,as they may be as committedas full-time staffduring the hours they work. 关于兼职工作人员没有同样程度的贡献的说法很可能是不公正的，因为他们在工作时间 可能与全职工作人员一样做出相同的贡献。 The current approach raises a number of ethical issues,which may also harm Kingtim Co's reputation.It has made commitments to act in accordance with society's expectations and to treat its staff fairly.Although the basic wage is not legally enforceable, it does represent society's expectations about what employees should be paid.Limiting rewards to staff who may only be able to work part-time because of other commitments could also be something that society judges to be discriminatory and may be against the law. 目前的做法引发了一些道德社会问题，这也可能损害 King 公司的声誉。它承诺按照社 会的期望行事，并公平对待其工作人员。虽然基本工资在法律上不可执行，但它确实代 表了社会对员工应该支付最低工资报酬的期望；限制奖励从事兼职工作的工作人员，也 可能是社会认为具有歧视性的，可能是违法的。 In addition,if Kingtim Co's directors are given more lucrative contracts as a takeover defence mechanism,this undermines the argument for limiting staff costs in order to maintain shareholder returns. 此外，如果 King 的董事获得更丰厚的劳动合同作为反收购机制，这就破坏了限制员工 成本以维持股东回报的论点。 The consequences of these threats to reputation might again be that lower-paid staff eventually decide to leave.A high staff turnover willmean few staff develop experience and expertise over time,which may impact on customer quality.Kingtim Co may also have problems recruiting staff for its new outdoor business.Customers may also stop shopping at Kingtim Co in protest at the poor treatment of staff. 这些对声誉的威胁的后果可能是，低薪员工最终决定离开。高员工流动率将意味着很少 有员工随着时间的推移发展经验和专业知识，这可能会影响工作质量。 King 公司也可能 在为其新的户外业务招聘员工方面遇到问题。顾客也可能停止在King 公司购物，以抗 议员工的恶劣待遇。 评分标准： Strategic Professional-Options,AFM Advanced Financial Management(AFM) September/December 2020 Sample Marking Scheme R Marks (examples of points could include company less appealing,use of proceeds from sell-off, how Kingtim Co will be viewed,smaller company being more affordable) Onerous contracts (examples of points could include cost burden,acquirer may be prepared to bear it,corporate governance requirements,shaeholder reaction) 3-4 3-4 (b)(i Cost of equity Value of equity Value of existing bonds WACC i) Annual spot yield curve Value of new bonds Market value of new bonds Yield to matuity of proposed bonds (iii) Asset beta garden centre business Weighted asse beta Revised equity beta Revised cost of equity Revised WACC (v Revised P/L Assumptions Equity holders (examples of points could include inadequate returns,higher business and financial risks,threat to earnings/dividend/share price,covenant/repayment commitments, forecast extra eamings insufficient,sale of shares/changes in shareholder base) Bond holders 1 2 7 1 2 12 7 3 3 1-2 3-4 3-4 Professional marks for part(b) Report format Structure and presentation of the report (c) Up to 2 marks for each well-explained issue (issues could include rewarding expertise/seniority fairly,balancingshareholderand employee interests,unfair to question staff's commitment,society's expectations/law,expectations raised by Kingtim Co's statements,employee/customer reaction to poor practices) Max NLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (a) 最高7分 出售资产(例如失去并购的吸引力，处置后现金的使用，小公司更容易被购买等king 公司的观点)——3-4分 更改薪酬合约(如增加成本负担，收购者或许已经做好准备，公司治理要求，股东 的反应等——3-4分) (b) (i) 股权资本成本 1 股权价值 1' 原有债权的价值 1' 加权资本成本1' (ii) 年收益率 1 债权估值过程3‘ 债权的市场价值1 到期收益率 1 (iii) 花园中心贝塔a 1' 加权平均贝塔a1' 新的贝塔e 1 新股权资本成本 1' 新加权资本成本1' (iv) 修正的损益 1' (v) 资本成本 1-2' 假设使用 3-4' 股东 3-4' 债权人 专业分值 1’ 3‘报告格式 1’ 3‘ 结构和行文 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (c) 以下每个观点可以被给予2分合计不超过8分 (只给有经验的老员工报酬，平衡股东和员工的利益，对员工贡献的不工作对待， 社会的期望和法律法规的要求，员工和顾客可能的行动等)

stem_zh: Q1 Chakula Co is a large listed company involved in two business sectors.Its main business is in the production of food and drink for supermarkets and other large traders.It also owns a chain of coffee shops nationwide.Chakula co's board of directors(BoD)thinks that the company is undervalued and is of the opinion that it should focus on the rapid innovation taking place in the food and drink production sector. 题干
explanation_zh: Chakula 公司作为上市公司，主要涉及向超市和经销商提供食品和饮料两个产品， 他也有全国性的咖啡店产业链， C 公司的董事会认为这个公司现在价值被低估了，公司应该 把目光放在食品和饮料行业的飞速创新上。 Therefore,Chakula Co's BoD has decided to unbundle the coffee shops'business into a company called Kawa Co.Chakula Co willthen either demerge Kawa Co through a spin-off or sellKawa Co. Chakula Co will then turn its full focus on its remaining business of food and drink production. Initially,Chakula Co's shareholders willown Kawa Co on the basis of owning one Kawa Co share for every Chakula Co share owned by them. 因 此 ，C 公司董事会决定拆分一下咖啡店业务给 Kawa,C 公司要么将 KAWA 剥 离 spin off出 去或者卖掉。 C 公司接下来会把目光放在现有的食品和饮料生产上，最开始， C 公司的股东 会按照每持有一股C 的 股 票，而拥有 一股Kawa 的股票，即 1:1. Lahla Co is a large unlisted company controlled by 20 shareholders who all have a significant stake in the business.Lahla Co owns a number of hotels around the country and is looking to diversify into the coffee retail business.Lahla Co has approached Chakula Co about the possibility of purchasing Kawa Co.Lahla Co will finance the purchase either through a cash-only offer or a share-for-share offer. L 公司是 一个未上市的公司，有20个股东，都和业务有重大关系， L 有酒店业务，正在寻 找扩张进咖啡零售业务的机会。 L 在和 C 商讨看收购 Kawa 的可能性， L 会通过现金或者以 股换股的方式收购 If Kawa Co is demerged,It will be listed on the stock exchange as an independent company. Chakula Co is unsure whether to sell Kawa Co to Lahla Co or to demerge it into an independent company. C 不确定是把 Kawa 卖 给L 还是拆分成一个单独的公司。 Areas for further clarification Further clarification has been sought by Lahla Co's BoD on the following two areas: (i)Lahla Co's chief executive officer(CEO)has determined that a regulatory framework in the area of mergers and acquisitions is designed to protect the interests of shareholders and other stakeholders.She wants to find out why there is a need for a regulatory framework. L 的 CEO 想要看看没有 M&A 的相关规则规定，能够保护股东和其他相关者的利益。 (ii)The acquisition of Kawa Co will be a major investment for Lahla Co and its BoD has concerns about how the acquisition will be financed.The BoD has heard that there are several theories explaining the capital structure of a company,including the following two propositions: Lahla 的股东含看重 Kawa 这个投资和他的融资方法。 BOD 听说了一下两种解释公司资本结 构 的理 论 。 --A company should maximise its debt financing:and --Too much debt can be harmful to a company and there needs to be a balance between equity and debt financing. -公司应该最大化债务融资； --太多的债务会使公司经营艰难，因此要平衡债与股 Capital structure details Extracts from Chakula Co's financial statements are as follows: Assets less current liabilities Financed by: Share capital(nominal value so-50 per share) Reserves Non-current liabilities:Loan notes A(nomimal value s100 per loan note) Non-current liabilities:Loan notes B(nomimal value S100 per loan note) 1,180 2,470 360 Chakula Co's shares are trading at $2.45 each and have an equity beta of 1.3.The part of the business which will become Kawa Co accounts for 24.5%of Chakula Co's total equity value. Chakula Co's loan notes A currently have a total market value of $2,100m.Loan notes B currently have a total market value of $400m.The pre-tax cost of debt has been determined at 43%for loan notes A and 41%for loan notes B..After the unbundling.loan notes B will be serviced by Kawa Co and loan notes A will remain with Chakula Co,but the pre-tax cost of debt for both will increase by 0.3%.It is expected that Kawa Co will maintain its capital structure after the unbundling. C公司的股票价格是$2.45元，equity beta 是1 . 3,Kawa 的业务是C 的24 . 5%,C 公司的债券 A 现在的全部市价是$2100m, 债 券 B 市 价是$400m,A 的 Kdbt 是 4 3 % ,B的Kdb t是 4 1 % , 在 拆分之后，B 债券会由 Kawa 来使用，两个债券的Kdbt 都 会 增 加 0 . 3 % , 预 期 Kawa 公司会 保持他的资本比例 Lahla Co's debt to equity ratio is estimated to be 40:60 in equivalent market value terms and it has 1200 million shares in issue.The coffee retail industry is dominated by Buni Co,a large listed company which owns many coffee shops around the country.The average asset beta for the coffee retail industry is estimated at 1.15. Lah la公司的债股比预计为40:60,和市场行情相等，他有1200m支对外发行的股票。咖 啡 零售属于 Buni co, 一个大的上市公司，拥有很多的咖啡店，咖啡行业的asset beta 是1. 15 All companies pay corporation tax at a rate of 20%per year and tax is payable in the same year as the profits it is based on.The risk-free rate of return is estimated at 3%and the market risk premium at 72%. 所有公司的所得税税率是20%,税在发生相应收入的当年缴纳。0风险利率3%,市场风险溢 价 是 7 2 % 。 Kawa Co as a demerged company The following estimated information will be applicable to Kawa Co if it is demerged. Chakula Co's sales revenue is S4,500m currently,of which 20%is attributable to Kawa Co.It is estimated that after Kawa Co is demerged,its annual sales revenue growth rate will be 6%and the profit margin before interest and tax will be 1%of sales revenue,for each of the next four years.It can be assumed that the current tax allowable depreciation will remain equivalent to the amount of investment needed to maintain the current level of operations,but that Kawa Co will require an additional investment in assets of S0.25 for every 1 increase in sales revenue.After the initial four years,the annual growth rate of the company's free cash flows is expected to be 2.5% for the foreseeable future. C 的收入是$4500m,20% 分 给 Kawa, 预 计 当 Kawa 拆分之后，年度销售额增长率为6%,profit before interest and tax margin 在接下来四年是1%的收入。预计税务上的折旧和维持现在经营 状况的投资额相等，Kawa 会需要一笔额外投资，金额是收入每增加$1,投资增加$0.25,一开 始的四年之后，公司自由现金流的年度增长率预期是2.5%。 The following estimated information applies to the acquisition of Kawa Co by Lahla Co,if Kawa Co is acquired. The average price to earnings(PE)ratio for the hotel industry is 15.61,however,Lahla Co's PE ratio is estimated to be 10%lower than this.Extracts from the current statements of profit or loss applicable to Lahla Co and Kawa Co are as follows Lahla $m Kawa $m Profit before interest and tax 305 161.2 interest -91.2 -14.8 Tax(20%) -42.8 -29.3 Profit after tax 171 117.1 After the acquisition,it is expected that the PE ratio of the combined company will be the midpoint between the two individual companies'PE ratios.The annual after-tax profits will increase by$62m due to combining the two companies. 收购之后，合并的公司的PE ratio预期是两个公司单独 PE ratio 的平均数，税后利润会增加 $62m。 Lahla Co has proposed to pay for acquiring Kawa Co either through a cash offer of S0.66 for a Kawa Co share,or one Lahla Co share for every three Kawa Co shares.Lahla Co will borrow the money needed to pay for the acquisition. L 公司提出收购K公司要么通过现金收购，每股支付$0.66,或者每三股K 的股票支付 一股L 的股票。 L 也会为了收购借钱 (a)Explain why a regulatory framework related to mergers and acquisitions is necessary to protect the interests of shareholders and other stakeholders. (5marks) 问题解析：讨论为什么在收购时保护股东和其他投资者的利益很必要 Marking Scheme (a)Shareholders 2-3 Other stakeholders 2-3 Other comments 1-2 Max 5 答 案 ： a The key reason for a regulatory framework to exist in merger and acquisition(M&A)activity is to ensure that the interests of stakeholders are protected,and where the natural market forces may not be sufficient on their own to ensure that this happens. MA 的准则框架存在就是为了保护双方的利益 The regulatory framework aims to ensure a well-functioning market for corporate control.With respect to shareholders,as a major stakeholder group,the regulatory framework aims to establish that shareholders of the target company are not affected negatively by ensuring that: 股东作为主要的利益相关者团体，准则框架旨在保护股东不要受到负面的影响 --Minority shareholders'rights are protected; 少数股东权利被保护， --The target company's management cannot block a M&A where it is in commercial and economic interest of shareholders;and 当收购对股东的利益有益时，被收购公司的管理层不能阻止收购， -Sufficient time is made available for a proposal to be properly scrutinised.The regulatory framework also aims to en sure that sufficient information is provided about the proposed M&A for all investor groups to evaluate the proposed deal properly. 收购的邀约有充分的时间去被仔细检查，规则框架旨在时所有的投资团队都能够获得充分的 信息去评估这个收购。 With respect to other stakeholders,the aim of the regulatory framework is to ensure that there is not a substantial lessening of competition after the M&A has taken place.This will protect the choice that consumers,suppliers and employees have in engaging with a range of organisations in that business sector,and within a properly functioning economic market. 对于其他利益相关者，收购可以大幅减少竞争，这会保护其他人的权益。 (b)Discuss the two theoretical propositions,as raised by Lahla Co's board of directors(BoD),in relation to a company's capital structure. (6marks) 题干分析：讨论L公司董事会关于资本结构的两个理论假设 Marking Scheme (b) 3 marks for discussing each of the two propositions (b) 3 marks for discussing each of the two propositions The two theoretical propositions are based on the opinion that a company's capital structure does matter to the value of the company. The first proposition posits that since debt is cheaper than equity and there is a tax shield' attached to debt finance,it is better for a company to be financed by as much debt as possible. This is the view presented by the Modigliani and Miller with taxes model.Since interest is paid before a company pays corporation tax,but dividends are not,a company does not have to pay taxes on profits used to pay interest.This is referred to as a tax shield.The presence of a tax shield results in the cost of capital reducing as the proportion of debt financing increases. 第一个理论即 MM with tax,利息的抵税作用，会使得财务成本越来越低，因此债越多越好 The second proposition builds on this by arguing that although debt carries with it the advantage of a tax shield,at high levels of gearing this position no longer holds true.Here,financial risk increases significantly and the company experiences increasing levels of financial distress, resulting in the cost of equity increasing significantly.This overrides the benefits gained from the tax shield.As a result,the cost of capital increases.At very high levels of gearing,even the cost of debt starts to increase significantly.Hence,there is a trade-off between the benefits of the tax shield and the costs related to financial distress,such that the cost of capital reduces initially but then rises,meaning that there is an optimal,minimum cost of capital where corporate value is maximised. 第二个理论即静态平衡理论，税盾可以降低整体的资本成本，但是太高的债务的 比例，会导 致公司杠杆过高从而增加借款成本，因此需要形成一个平衡。在资本成本最低的地方，公司 价值最大 。 (c)Prepare a report for the BoD of Lahla Co which: (i)Estimates the value of each Kawa Co share if it is demerged and listed as an independent company; 估算一 下Kawa公司股票的价值，如果他拆分或上市按照一个单独的公司 (12marks) (ii)Estimates; .the additional equity value created when combining Lahla Co and Kawa Co; 当合并L和K,估计 一 下额外的股的价值。 .the percentage gain to each of Lahla Co's and Kawa Co's shareholder group under each payment method; 在不同的支付方法下， L和K的股东集团获益百分比是多少。 . the impact on Lahla Co's capital structure under each payment method;and 不同支付方式下，每种方式对L资本结构的影响。 (12marks) (ii)Evaluates the financial and other factors that both Lahla Co's shareholders and Kawa Co's shareholders would consider prior to agreeing to the acquisition,and the impact on Lahla Co's capital structure under each payment method. (11marks) 评估一下L和K公司股东同意收购之前会考虑的财务和其他因素，和不同支付方式下对L资 本结构的影响 Professional marks will be awarded in part(c)for the format,structure and presentation of the report. (4marks) (c)(i)(Appendices 1 and 2) Kawa Co demerged Kawa Co,value of equity Kawa Co,equity beta Kawa Co,cost of equity Kawa Co,cost of debt Kawa Co,cost of capital Sales revenue years 1 to 4 PBIT years 1 to 4 Taxation years 1 to 4 Additional asset investment years 1 to 4 Corporate value Value per share (ii)(Appendix 3) Lahla Co,current equity value Kawa Co,estimate of PE ratio Combined company,current equity value Estimate of additional value Cash offer:gain(both groups of shareholders) Share offer:gain(both groups of shareholders) Financing implications (iii)Report 7-8ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUMEvaluation of financial and other factors 7-8 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (Evaluation report could include,for example,financial retums from demerger and each form of consideration,exit strategies,concerns about becoming minority shareholders, but also concerns for majority shareholders on the impact minority shareholders may have,assumptions made and whether the value created from the share-for-share exchange is realistic) Impact on the capital structure Max Professional marks for part(c) Report format Structure and presentation of the report 4 Marking Scheme Report to the board of directors(BoD),Lahla Co This report evaluates and discusses the financial and other factors that both Lahla Co's and Kawa Co's shareholders wouldconsider prior to agreeing to the acquisition.It also evaluates and discusses the impact of the acquisition on Lahla Co's capital structure under the two payment methods. Factors to consider Demerger(Appendix 2) Acqusition,cash payment (Appendix 3) Acquisition,share-for-share exchange (Appendix 3) sh18areh3o%ldersshareholdersAdditional value created for Kawa Co's sh18areh3o%lders shareholders Additional value created for Kawa Co's 10 0%sh26areho7%ldersAdditional value created for Kawa Co's 10 0% sh26areho7%lders sh22are0h%oldersshareholdersAdditional value created for Lahla Co's sh22are0h%olders shareholders 14 0%Additional value created for Lahla Co's 14 0% The initial evaluation would indicate that the demerger is the better option for Kawa Co's shareholders,compared to the acquisition,if the acquisition is paid for by cash.However,the share-for-share exchange gives a higher return compared to the demerger and therefore,on purely financial grounds,this is the best option for Kawa Co's shareholders. 以股换股带来的收益比拆分更高，因此，从财务的角度来想，这样时更符合股东财富需求的。 Although Lahla Co's shareholders lose some additional value derived from the acquisition if the share-for-share option is chosen,they would probably still be in favour of the acquisition because the company's value will increase and so will the value of their shares. However,the following additional factors also need to be considered in the evaluation: The value estimates are based on predicted variables,both for the demerger valuation and for the acquisition valuations.It is likely that there will be changes to the actual variables,and it is recommended that Lahla Co undertake sensitivity analysis and assess the results of this before making the final acquisition decision. 实际的变量变化会降低准确性，建议进行敏感性测试 Kawa Co's shareholders probably have three main areas they would want considered further with respect to the acquisition with the share-for-share exchange. 如果要以股换股， K公司股东可能会考虑三个主要方向 First,they would become part of a larger company with interests both in hotels and in coffee shops and they would own just under 36%(667m shares/1,867m shares)of the share capital of the new combined company.However,they would be minority shareholders.As such,they may feel that they do not have sufficient influence in the major decisions the company makes. 他们会变成合并后公司的小股东，没有足够的决策权 Therefore,Kawa Co's shareholders may be of the opinion that operating as a stand-alone demerged independent company may give them a better opportunity to shape the company's strategy.On the other hand,they may equally decide that they wouldneed to be part of a large company to be able to compete effectively against Buni Co. 作为一个拆分出来的单独的公司运作会给公司更好的战略制定，但是作为大公司的一部分， 可能公司的竞争会更有效 Second,Kawa Co's shareholders cannot be certain whether the 26.7%additional value is realistic or not.This may be especially pertinent because Lahla Co is an unlisted company and therefore may keep proprietary/strategic information private,limiting the ability for external parties to undertake a full and effective evaluation. K 公司的股东不能确定额外的增值是不是真的实现，因为L 公司是一个非上市公司，信息不 够透明，不足以支持有效的评估。 Third,because Lahla Co is an unlisted company,Kawa Co's shareholders may be concerned about how they would be able to exit the company,if they want to.For instance,if their investment portfolios become imbalanced when the companies are combined,they may need to sell some shares to rebalance it.Lahla Co should consider the possibility of undertaking a partial listing in order to make the deal more palatable for Kawa Co's shareholders. 第 三 ， 因 为L 公司不上市，因此， K公司股东会担心无法抛出股票，平衡投资组合 In addition to ensuring that the acquisition is financially beneficial for them,Lahla Co's shareholders'main concern would be that Kawa Co's shareholders will own a significant portion of the combined company (just under 36%).This could mean that the new shareholders would have a significant influence on the way the company is run and its strategic direction,which may be different to what Lahla Co's current shareholders want. 更主要的是他们的持股比例只有嚄6%,会失去决策权。 Capital structure Original:Lahla Co 68·0%Cash payment:Combined company(Appendix3) 68·0% Share-for-share exchange:Combined company (Appendix 3) 46·9%Eq60it%y 46·9% Debt 40·0% ··% The cash payment option means that the proportion of market value of debt increases significantly and is higher than the market value of equity.This would probably increase the costs related to financial distress and future borrowing costs would increase as a result. 现金支付意味着市场债的比重会增加，甚至高于equity 的比重。 On the other hand,the share-for-share exchange increases the proportion of equity compared to debt financing.This may reduce financial distress costs,but also reduce Lahla Co's ability to benefit from the tax shields. On the face of it,it would appear that Lahla Co would find it difficult to raise the funds needed through just debt financing,although the BoD could explore this option further.Equity finance through a partial listing may be a necessary option which Lahla Co will need to explore as well, although this may require Lahla Co to disclose private information to the markets. 部分上市可以帮助公司更好的融资，虽然这需要公司披露更多的隐私信息。 Tutorial note:Additional consideration which could be made If the cash payment to Kawa Co's shareholders is increased to $0.71/share,to bring it in line with the value obtained from the demerger,and the funding is sought from debt financing,then the debt percentage compared to total firm value will increase to 53.8%(as shown below): [$0·71×2,000m shares =$1,420m. Market value of equity:$2,933·7m,46·2% Market value of debt =($1,601·7m+$1,420m+$400m)=$3,421·7m,53·8%] Conclusion The share-for-share exchange gives the highest return for Kawa Co's shareholders and also makes a good return for Lahla Co's shareholders.The impact on capital structure from this method is a higher percentage of equity and therefore scope to raise more finance through debt if required. However,concerns that Lahla Co is unlisted and complications arising from this might make the cash payment method the preferred one for Kawa Co shareholders.The current cash offer is less than the value generated from the demerger and therefore unlikely to be accepted.Therefore,a cash offer to match the benefit from the demerger would need to be made.The initial cash offer and a higher revised cash offer would have a significant impact on Lahla Co's capital structure in terms of increased debt.Therefore,it is recommended that Lahla Co should consider equity finance through a partial listing.This would also enable Kawa Co's shareholders to trade their shares and thereby make the deal look better for them.
