(14 marks) Professional marks willbe awarded for the demonstration of skill in commercial acumen,analysis,scepticism and evaluation in your answer. 题干解析： 1.Boullain 公司和其对冲策略 Boullain 公司总部位于欧元区，生产农业机械零部件。该公司五年前获得上市，由债务 和股权组合融资。除了创始人的股权，股东还包括养老基金和其他机构投资者。直到 最近，销售仅在欧元区内，但董事们热衷于扩张，并将北美确定为主要出口市场。该 公司最近完成了对美国一家客户的首次销售，但是在接下来的六个月内不会收到付款。 在最近的一次董事会会议上， Boullain 公司的财务总监称，向外国市场的扩张需要一项 正式的对冲政策，如果将该政策传达给公司的其他利益相关方，股东价值将得到提高。 然 而 ，Boullain 公司的首席执行官不同意财务总监的意见，理由如下。首先，现有股东 已经多元化，因此不会受益于额外的风险降低对冲策略。其次，通过向其他利益相关 方(如债务提供者、员工、客户和供应商)传达对冲政策，对股东价值没有明显的好 处。你被要求在下次董事会会议之前对财务总监意见提供理由。 2.对冲工具 假设今天的日期是20X0 年 3 月 1 日 。Boullain Co将于20X0 年8月31日从美国客户处 收到$18,600,000。财务总监希望将公司的外汇风险降至最低，可以使用远期合约、 exchange traded futures和期权去实现目标。 已获得以下报价。 Exchange rates (quoted as €/US$1) Spot 0·8707-0·8711 Six months forward 0·8729-0·8744 Currency futures (contract size €200,000;exercise price quoted as USS per €1) Exercise price March 1·1476 June 1·1449 September 1·1422 Currency options (contract size ∈200,000;exercise price quoted as USS per€1,premium:US cents per e1) Exercise 1·1420 price September 0·89 假设期货和期权合约在月末到期，并且没有基差风险。在计算中，要使用的合同数量 应小数点后舍去到最接近的整数。如果无法使用整数的期货或期权合约对冲全额，则 使用远期合约对冲余额。 一旦头寸打开，上述欧元期货合约将按照逐日盯市制进行交易。合同条款要求Boullain 公司向清算中心对每份合同交纳初始保证金。假设维护保证金等于初始保证金。 您的经理担心未平仓期货头寸对Boullain 公司现金流的影响，要求您解释保证金带来 的影响和它们对于对冲决策的重要性。 (a)Explain the rationale for the policy of hedging Boullain Co's foreign exchange risk and the potential benefits to shareholder value if that policy is effectively communicated to the company's key stakeholders. (6 marks) Requirements解析： 解释 Boullain公司外汇风险对冲政策的基本原理，以及如果该政策有效传达给公司的 主要利益相关方，对股东价值的潜在好处。 Marking Scheme Rationale for hedging policy Communication of policy with stakeholders (examples of stakeholders may include debt providers,employees,customers and suppliers, policy may include example to reduce agency and distress costs) 答案： Rationale for hedging policy Within the framework of Modigliani and Miller,Boullain Co's CEO is correct in stating that a company's hedging policy is irrelevant.In a world without transaction or agency costs,and where markets are efficient and information symmetrical, hedging creates no value if shareholders are well diversified.Shareholder value may even be destroyed if the costs associated with hedging exceed the benefits. However,in the real world where market imperfections exist,including the transaction costs of bankruptcy and other types of financial distress,hedging protects shareholder value by avoiding the distress costs associated with potentially devastating foreign exchange fluctuations. Active hedging may also benefit debt-holders by reducing the agency costs of debt.A clearly defined hedging policy acts as a signalling tool between shareholders and debt-holders.In this sense,hedging allows for higher leverage and a lower cost of debt and reduces the need for restrictive covenants. Communication of policy with stakeholders Even when foreign exchange risks are hedged,the funding of variation margin payments on exchange traded futures can create financial distress.A well communicated hedging strategy allows debt providers to make informed decisions about Boullain Co's ability to service its debt. Agency costs and the risk of financial distress also impact the expected wealth of employees who,unlike shareholders,may not enjoy the risk reduction benefits of a diversified portfolio.A consistent hedging policy reduces the risks faced by employees which may serve to benefit Boullain Co in the form of motivational and productivity improvements. Customers and suppliers have claims on a company which create shareholder value but are conditional upon Boullain Co's survival.Suppliers may invest in production systems which create value in the form of lower costs.For customers,these claims reflect promises of quality and after-sales service levels which enable Boullain Co to charge higher prices.In both cases,shareholder value is created as long as the customers and suppliers believe these claims will be honoured.One way of achieving this is by implementing a hedging strategy and communicating it to stakeholders. In conclusion,management should attempt to communicate the principles underlying its hedging strategy and the benefits to shareholder value in the form of reduced agency and distress costs.In this way,stakeholders can make informed decisions about the potential risks and impact on their expected wealth. 答案解析： · 对冲的基本原理 在 MM 的理论内，Boullain 公司的首席执行官说公司的对冲政策无关紧要是正确的。 在一个没有交易或代理成本、市场高效且信息对称的世界里，如果股东持有充分多 样化的投资组合，公司的对冲政策就没有价值。如果与对冲相关的成本超过收益， 股东财富甚至可能被破坏。 然而，现实世界中存在市场缺陷，包括破产和其他类型的财务困境。对冲通过避免 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION 潜在的毁灭性外汇波动来保护股东价值。 主动对冲还可以通过降低债务的代理成本使债务持有人受益。明确对冲政策对股东 和债务持有人是一个比较好的信号。从这个意义上讲，对冲允许更高的杠杆率和更 低的债务成本，并减少了对限制性契约的需求。 · 与利益相关方沟通 即使在对冲外汇风险的情况下，为期货交易补充保证金缺口提供资金，也可能造成 财务困境。一个沟通良好的对冲策略允许债权人就 Boullain 公司的偿债能力做出 有利于公司的决定。 代理成本和财务困境风险也会影响员工的预期财富，与股东不同，他们可能无法享 受多元化投资组合带来的降低风险的收益。对冲政策降低了员工面临的风险，这可 能有助于 Boullain公司通过激励和生产力改善的形式受益。 在 Boullain 公司活着的前提下，客户和供应商对一家公司有需求是可以为股东创造 价值的。供应商可以投资生产系统，通过降低成本给股东创造价值。对于客户来说， 这些需求反映了公司对质量和售后服务水平的承诺，这使得Boullain 公司能够收取 更高的价格。在这两种情况下，只要客户和供应商相信这些权利将得到兑现，股东 价值就会被创造出来。实现这一目标的方法之一就是实施对冲策略并将其传达给利 益相关方。 总之，管理层应尝试以降低代理成本和困境成本的形式传达其对冲策略的基本原则 和股东价值的好处。通过这种方式，利益相关方可以就潜在风险及其对其预期财富 的影响做出明智的决定。 (b)Recommend a hedging strategy for Boullain Co's foreign currency receipt in six months'time based on the hedging choices the finance director is considering. appropriateSupport your 16,178,280 Recommendation and discussion The forward and futures contracts fix the exchange rate with the futures contract generating a slightly higher euro receipt compared to the forward.However,the futures contract is exposed to basis risk. The futures contract is also marked-to-market daily.This means that Boullain Co deposits an initial margin with the clearing house when the futures position is opened.The notional profit or loss at each day's closing settlement price is added to or subtracted from the margin account balance.If the margin account balance falls below the level of the maintenance margin, Boullain Co is required to deposit aditional funds to top-up the margin account,known as a variation margin.Boullain Co needs to consider that the initial margin and any variation margins would need to be funded and would impact cash flow in the short term. The option outcome of e16,178,280 provides a worst-case scenario based on the option being exercised.The option premium is expensive which results in a lower receipt if the option is exercised.Unlike the forward and futures contracts,however, the option allows Boullain Co to retain the upside whilst also protecting against the downside risk.Based on the forward and futures markets,the dollar is expected to strengthen and it is therefore unlikely the option would be exercised. The final hedging choice depends on the board's attitude to risk.However,assuming there is no default risk associated with the forward contract,this may be the best choice under the circumstances.The board may also wish to consider the possibility of not hedging since the dollar is expected to strengthen. In order to reduce counter-party risk,Boullain Co deposits an initial margin with the clearing house when the futures position is opened.The notional profit or loss at each day's closing settlement price is added to or subtracted from the margin account balance.If the margin account balance falls below the level of the maintenance margin,Boullain Co is required to deposit additional funds to top-up the margin account,known as a variation margin. If Boullain Co makes a notional profit on any day,the amount in the margin account will be greater than the specified maintenance margin and no variation margin is required.The profit on each such a day may be withdrawn in cash. 答案解析： 对于六个月后的外币收入，我们希望通过远期合约、期货合约和期权合约今天就将这 笔外币收入对应的本币收入确定下来，消除未来汇率波动的风险和不确定性。 · 远期合约 对于外币美元收入，我们需要买欧元本币，卖外币美元，所以按照对自己不利的选，A 六个月的远期汇率选择0.8729(€/US$)。 · 期货合约 对于8月31日的外币收入，我们选择9月到期的期货合约。由于合约币种是欧元，交 易需要我们买欧元，所以我们是现在买9月的期货合约构建对冲。 由于合约币种和需要对冲的币种不是同一币种，所以我们需要先基于基差预测8月31 日 那 天 的 expected future price。 expected future price =open future price + unexpired basis =1.1431。然后就用这个预测出来价格将外币应收款转换成和期货合约 币种一致的币种，除以contract size计算合约数量，没有被合约cover的部分用远期合 约0.8729 (E/US$) 处理。 · 期权合约 期权同样也是选择9月到期的期货合约。由于合约币种是欧元，交易需要我们买欧元， 也就是欧元被买的权利，所以现在买9月的calloption 构建对冲。现在需要付期权费， 期权费的多少需要计算合约数量，由于合约币种和需要对冲的币种不是同一币种，所 以我们需要先用行权价将外币应收款转换成和期货合约币种一致的币种，除以contract size计算合约数量，没有被合约cover的部分同样用远期合约0.8729 (E/US$) 处 理 。 注意期权费由于是外币美元标价，需要按照即期汇率0.8711 (E/US$) 转换成本币。外 汇期权我们是默认行权的，所以最终的结果是综合81份期权合约可以cover的本金金 额，综合期权费和用远期合约处理的unhedge 的这三部分组成。 · 建议 远期和期货合约固定汇率，期货合约产生的收益比远期略高。 然而，期货合约面临基差风险，并每天按市价计价。初始保证金和变动保证金需要融 资，并将在短期内影响现金流。 €16,178,280的期权结果提供了基于行使期权的最坏情况。期权溢价很高，如果行使期 权，收益会降低。然而，与远期和期货合约不同的是，期权允许Boullain 公司保持上 行，同时也防止下行风险。基于远期和期货市场，美元有望走强，因此不太可能行使 期权 。 最后对冲的选择取决于董事会对风险的态度。然而，假设没有与远期合同相关的违约 风险，这可能是在这种情况下的最佳选择。董事会还可能希望考虑不对冲的可能性， 因为预计美元将走强。 为了降低交易对手的风险， Boullain 公司在期货头寸开仓时向清算所存入初始保证金。 每天收盘结算价格的名义利润或损失会被加到保证金账户余额或从保证金账户余额中 减去。如果保证金账户余额低于维持保证金的水平， Boullain 公司需要存入额外的资金 来补充保证金账户，称为变动保证金。 如 果Boullain 公司在任何 一 天获得名义利润，保证金账户中的金额将大于规定的维持 保 证 金 ，并且不需要变动保证金。每天的利润可以提取出来。 Professional skills marks Analysis and evaluation - Appropriate use of the data to determine suitable calculations - Appropriate use of the data to support discussion and draw appropriate conclusions - Appraisal of information objectively to make a recommendation Scepticism Effective challenge of information supplied to support key facts and/or decisions - Demonstration of ability to consider relevant factors applicable to hedging options Commercial acumen - Recommendations are practical and plausible in the context of Boullain Co's situation - Effective use of examples from the scenario information and other practical considerations related to the context to illustrate points being made Maximum 5marks 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION Advanced Financial Management (AFM) 2024.09-2025.06 高顿ACCA 考纲解析白皮书 (选修科目) 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION AFM: Advanced Financial Management (高级财务管理)2024.09-2025.06 请注意：自2022年9月考季起，中国大陆地区P 阶段的选修科目改革为卷面80分学术+20分的专业。 目录 1.科目介绍 2- 2.近3年全球通过率 2- 3.Syllabus and Study Guide 考试大纲与科目知识结构 3- 4.新旧考纲的主要变化 4- 5.科目关联性 4- 6.准备知识 4- 7.考试形式 5- 8.考试题型及分值分配 5-

(B)展示了国内外大环境下，高级财务管理人员如何科学评估项目并作出合理的投资决策，跨国公司常用的 融资渠道和资金成本的计算，以及项目获得的收益如何更好地进行分配和使用。 (C)描述兼并收购这个业务场景下的企业估值、协同效应评估、收购对价设计和相关法律法规的具体要求。 (D 展示面临财务危机的跨国公司如何设计财务重组和业务重构进行自救，分析不同企业的利益相关群体对 于重组方案的潜在反应。 (E) 解释跨国公司的高级财务管理人员如何应对和管理外汇风险和利率风险。 (F)说明高级财务管理人员需要具备的专业能力。 (H) 说明高级财务管理人员需要具备的就业能力与技术能力。 Advanced investment appraisal(B)Professionalskills(F)Role of senior financial adviserin AFM《高级财务管理》考察的是作为一名高级财务人员或咨询人员如何运用相关知识、技巧和专业判断来 为企业财务管理提出建议。 AFM 与 FM《 财务管理》直接相关。 因涉及到职业道德、财务报表分析和公司战略方面的内容，AFM 也与SBL 间接相关。Advanced Financial Management (AFM)Financial Company operating profit X Less:ROA×Company asset base (X) Value spread XX (3)Assuming that the value spread would be earned in perpetuity,the Calculated Intangible Value(CIV)is found as follows: -Find the post-tax value spread. -Divide the post-tax value spread by the cost of capital -Find the present value of the post-tax value spread as a perpetuity (the CIV).
